member.name: T:Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorCoroutine
member.summary: A handle to an EditorCoroutine, can be passed to EditorCoroutineUtility methods to control lifetime.

member.name: M:Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorWindowCoroutineExtension.StartCoroutine(UnityEditor.EditorWindow,System.Collections.IEnumerator)
M:Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorWindowCoroutineExtension.StopCoroutine(UnityEditor.EditorWindow,Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorCoroutine)
M:Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorCoroutineUtility.StartCoroutine(System.Collections.IEnumerator,System.Object)
member.remarks: Only types that don't inherit from UnityEngine.Object will get collected the next time the GC runs instead of getting null-ed immediately.

member.name: M:Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorCoroutineUtility.StartCoroutineOwnerless(System.Collections.IEnumerator)
M:Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorCoroutineUtility.StopCoroutine(Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorCoroutine)
T:Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorWaitForSeconds
P:Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorWaitForSeconds.WaitTime
member.summary: The time to wait in seconds.

member.name: M:Unity.EditorCoroutines.Editor.EditorWaitForSeconds.#ctor(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a instruction object for yielding inside a generator function.
member.param: The amount of time to wait in seconds.
